Get involved

Venues

A week across the city.

Leicester Space Week brings space into the places where the city learns, works, gathers and imagines.

Our event locations

Programme activity is planned across Space Park Leicester, the National Space Centre, the University of Leicester, LCB Depot, Leicester Cathedral and citywide schools. Confirmed event pages will include venue directions, access information and travel guidance.

LEICESTER SPACE WEEKExploring innovation together

A citywide platform for space innovation, sustainability, skills and public engagement—built with Leicester’s research, industry and civic partners.
